# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Go runtime as parent image
FROM golang:1.17 AS builder

# Set environment variables
ENV CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux

# Copy go mod and sum files
COPY go.* ./

# Dependencies installation
RUN go mod download

# Copy source code to Docker image
COPY . /go/src/app

# Compile the binary.
WORKDIR /go/src/app
RUN go build -o main .

# Use smaller base scaffolding
FROM alpine:latest  

# Copy built binary from builder stage to minimal base image 
COPY --from=builder /go/src/app/main /usr/local/bin/

# Run the executable.
CMD ["main"]
